name: harness-core
description: An opinionated workflow + knowledge harness with four structural differentiators: (1) three-tier work model — objective (long-lived why, Key Results, milestones, decisions log) → workstream (heavy QRDPIV lifecycle, multi-session) → task (lightweight unit, proportional admin); (2) progressive distillation — compress at every handoff, proportional to work size, lossy and phase-targeted; (3) peer-reviewed knowledge pipeline — scout → harvest → distill → cartograph → sync, vault grows only by admission, nothing rewrites itself unsupervised; (4) a deterministic verification gate (tools/gate.py, GO/NO-GO exit code) for hard measurable concerns, leaving soft judgments qualitative and recorded; plus determinism for the repeatable — any task done twice becomes a CLI. No agent personas, no theme — just the capabilities.

workspace_root.title: Workspace root override
workspace_root.description: Optional. Absolute path to the harness workspace. Leave empty to use the directory Claude Code was launched from.

max_concurrent_agents.title: Max concurrent subagents
max_concurrent_agents.description: Soft budget for how many subagents may run in flight at once — a cost/coordination guideline, not a safety cap. Also set during init-workspace.
